summary: Comprehensive testing of WhatsApp CRM system completed successfully. Both backend APIs and frontend functionality are working correctly with minor issues identified.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized requests
minor_issues.impact: Cosmetic - both status codes indicate unauthorized access correctly

minor_issues.issue: Error message not displayed for invalid login attempts
minor_issues.impact: User experience - invalid login shows console error but no UI feedback

passed_tests: Dashboard loading with conversation list (4 conversations found)
Conversation selection and chat window opening
Message history display in chat window
User role-based access (both admin and agent can access all features)

success_percentage.backend: 89% (8/9 tests passed - 1 minor status code difference)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - 1 minor UI feedback issue)

action_item_for_E1: Minor improvements needed: 1) Add error message display for invalid login attempts in LoginPage component, 2) Consider standardizing HTTP status codes for unauthorized access (optional)
